scenario: post-reset technical warm-up and transport sanity check
objective: verify that the path remains stable before the repeatability baseline starts
instructions: Confirm that the full reset has already been completed before starting.;;Stay outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;If the path looks less stable than in the earlier precursor, stop and record the issue explicitly.

objective: capture the repeated empty reference under the same L1 stand geometry
instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: repeated static presence in the controlled path
objective: reproduce the static-presence reference from the earlier precursor
instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Reproduce the same standing position used in the earlier precursor as closely as practical.;;Do not touch the chair, AP node, table, or cables.

scenario: repeated slow motion in the controlled path
objective: reproduce the slow-motion reference from the earlier precursor
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Repeat the same slow-motion pattern used in the earlier precursor as closely as practical.;;Do not change the topology of the stand.

scenario: empty scene recovery after the first repeated motion cycle
objective: check the reverse transition back to empty after the repeated cycle
instructions: Leave the controlled path again.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: second repeated static presence in the same controlled path
objective: give a second static-presence evidence point inside the repeat session
instructions: Return to the midpoint of the controlled path.;;Stand almost still in approximately the same position as in S1.;;Avoid extra motion not needed for the block.

scenario: second repeated slow motion in the same controlled path
objective: give a second slow-motion evidence point inside the repeat session
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.;;Repeat the same slow motion pattern as closely as practical.;;Do not move chairs, table, AP node, capture node, or cables.

scenario: final empty recovery after the repeatability run
objective: finish the repeat session with a final empty reference
instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
